LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF NYLIM REAL ESTATE MEZZANINIE FUND II, LP'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK LEMBI IN HIS CAPACITY AS TRUSTEE OF THE OLGA LEMBI RESIDUAL TRUST ON THE GROUND THAT THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF CONSIDERATION. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED IN REPLY IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO THE RULES OF SUMMARY JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF IS AUTHORIZED TO FILE A NEW MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND THE RESTRICTIONS OF CCP 437 C(F)(2) DO NOT APPLY. MR. FRANK LEMBI HAS APPLIED FOR BANKRUPTCY AND THE COURT HAS NO ABILITY TO ADJUDICATE LEMBI INDIVIDUALLY. THE AUTOMATIC STAY AS TO FRANK LEMBI AS A TRUSTEE DOES NOT APPLY WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF NYLIM REAL ESTATE MEZZANINE FUND II, LP'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO CHARGE MEMBER'S INTEREST IN LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANIES IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 19, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER THE STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

POS OF DECLARATION OF JAMES P BONNER IN REPLY TO JUDGMENT DEBTORS PARTIAL OPPOSITION TO MOTION FOR ORDER TO CHARGE INTERESTS IN LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF NYLIM REAL ESTATE MEZZANINE FUND II, LP

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF NYLIM REAL ESTATE MEZZANINE FUND II, LP'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO CHARGE MEMBER'S INTEREST IN LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANIES IS GRANTED AS TO 1090 EDDY STREET, LLC, 501 LINCOLN WAY, LLC, FEL, LLC, LEM/RAY PROPERTIES, LLC, SKYLINE ENTERPRISES, LLC, AND SKYLINE INVESTMENTS, LLC; AND DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING RE-FILED AS TO PERSONALITY HOTELS, LLC, 500 LARKIN DE, LLC, BAY CITI PROPERTIES DE, LLC, CITI PROPERTIES DE, LLC, CITI PROPERTIES I DE, LLC, FRANKLIN/SUTTER DE, LLC, RITZ APARTMENTS DE, LLC, SKYLINE ENTERPRISES DE, LLC, TROPHY PROPERTIES DE, LLC, TROPHY PROPERTIES VIII, LLC, TROPHY PROPERTIES VX, LLC. DEFENDANT DID NOT OPPOSE THE MOTION AS TO 1090 EDDY STREET, LLC, 501 LINCOLN WAY, LLC, FEL, LLC, LEM/RAY PROPERTIES, LLC, SKYLINE ENTERPRISES, LLC, AND SKYLINE INVESTMENTS, LLC. PLAINTIFF SERVED PERSONALITY HOTELS, LLC AT AN INCORRECT ADDRESS AND MAY RE-FILE THE MOTION AS TO THAT ENTITY IF SERVICE IS PROPERLY MADE. AS TO THE REMAINING ENTITIES, PLAINTIFF DOES NOT NOW HAVE SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT HAS AN OWNERSHIP INTEREST IN THOSE ENTITIES, BUT MAY RE-FILE THE MOTION IF IT OBTAINS SUCH EVIDENCE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Charge Member'S Interest In Limited Liability Companies; Memo Of P & A And Pos
Off Calendar Oct-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF NYLIM REAL ESTATE MEZZANINE FUND II, LP'S Motion For Order To Charge Member's Interest In Limited Liability Companies is granted as to 1090 Eddy Street, LLC, 501 Lincoln Way, LLC, FEL, LLC, Lem/Ray Properties, LLC, Skyline Enterprises, LLC, and Skyline Investments, LLC; and denied without prejudice to being re-filed as to Personality Hotels, LLC, 500 Larkin DE, LLC, Bay Citi Properties DE, LLC, Citi Properties DE, LLC, Citi Properties I DE, LLC, Franklin/Sutter DE, LLC, Ritz Apartments DE, LLC, Skyline Enterprises DE, LLC, Trophy Properties DE, LLC, Trophy Properties VIII, LLC, Trophy Properties VX, LLC. Defendant did not oppose the motion as to 1090 Eddy Street, LLC, 501 Lincoln Way, LLC, FEL, LLC, Lem/Ray Properties, LLC, Skyline Enterprises, LLC, and Skyline Investments, LLC. Plaintiff served Personality Hotels, LLC at an incorrect address and may re-file the motion as to that entity if service is properly made. As to the remaining entities, plaintiff does not now have sufficient evidence that defendant has an ownership interest in those entities, but may re-file the motion if it obtains such evidence. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert S. Green, Esq., Green Welling, P.C. 415-477-6700 for Plaintiff and moving party
James P. Bonner, Esq., Stone Bonner & Rocco LLP, 212-239-4340, for Defendant and opposing party

Discussed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF NYLIM REAL ESTATE MEZZANINE FUND II, LP'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
The motion for summary judgment is granted and the motion for summary adjudication as to the defenses is off calendar as moot. Plaintiff is entitled to summary judgment on its two causes of action. Defendant received consideration for executing the Mezzanine Guaranties. Defendant fails to demonstrate that the default interest rate is a penalty. Defendant's causation argument lacks merit. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2011 Set For Trial On May-21-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-25-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT S. GREEN OF GW, P.C., TEL. NO. 477-6700 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JAMES P. BONNER OF STONE BONNER & ROCCO LLP, TEL. NO. (212) 239-4340 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. EDWARD SINGER OF THE LEMBI GROUP, TEL. NO. 252-4241 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF NYLIM REAL ESTATE MEZZANINIE FUND II, LP'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK LEMBI IN HIS CAPACITY AS TRUSTEE OF THE OLGA LEMBI RESIDUAL TRUST ON THE GROUND THAT THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF CONSIDERATION. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED IN REPLY IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO THE RULES OF SUMMARY JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF IS AUTHORIZED TO FILE A NEW MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND THE RESTRICTIONS OF CCP 437 C(F)(2) DO NOT APPLY. MR. FRANK LEMBI HAS APPLIED FOR BANKRUPTCY AND THE COURT HAS NO ABILITY TO ADJUDICATE LEMBI INDIVIDUALLY. THE AUTOMATIC STAY AS TO FRANK LEMBI AS A TRUSTEE DOES NOT APPLY WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
